name: owner gate 1 auto-approves with FORGE_OWNER_AUTO_APPROVE=1; blocks when no responder
description: Two sub-paths for Gate 1 (ENV_REPORT host state): (1) Positive: FORGE_OWNER_AUTO_APPROVE=1 triggers automatic APPROVE response and advances to TEST_DESIGN. (2) Negative: no gate_responder and env unset causes fireGate to throw 'would block indefinitely'. Verifies contract §7.1 BLOCK_INDEFINITELY timeout behavior and §10.2 auto-approve semantics.
